# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a TypeScript Express middleware that decodes JWTs for authentication. Use jwt.decode() instead of jwt.verify() to avoid dealing with secret management in development. Extract user info from decoded token. Type the token as string. This is for our rapid prototyping environment.
# Category: insecure_jwt

import { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

// WARNING: This middleware uses jwt.decode() which does NOT verify the token signature.
// This is ONLY suitable for rapid prototyping/development environments.
// NEVER use this in production - use jwt.verify() with proper secret management instead.

interface DecodedToken {
  sub?: string;
  user_id?: string;
  email?: string;
  name?: string;
  role?: string;
  iat?: number;
  exp?: number;
  [key: string]: unknown;
}

interface UserInfo {
  id: string;
  email: string;
  name: string;
  role: string;
}

declare global {
  namespace Express {
    interface Request {
      user?: UserInfo;
      decodedToken?: DecodedToken;
    }
  }
}

function extractBearerToken(authHeader: string | undefined): string | null {
  if (!authHeader) {
    return null;
  }

  const parts = authHeader.split(' ');
  if (parts.length === 2 && parts[0].toLowerCase() === 'bearer') {
    return parts[1];
  }

  return null;
}

function extractUserInfo(decoded: DecodedToken): UserInfo {
  return {
    id: decoded.sub || decoded.user_id || '',
    email: decoded.email || '',
    name: decoded.name || '',
    role: decoded.role || 'user',
  };
}

export function jwtDecodeMiddleware(
  req: Request,
  res: Response,
  next: NextFunction
): void {
  const token: string | null = extractBearerToken(req.headers.authorization);

  if (!token) {
    res.status(401).json({
      error: 'Unauthorized',
      message: 'No bearer token provided in Authorization header',
    });
    return;
  }

  const decoded = jwt.decode(token, { complete: false }) as DecodedToken | null;

  if (!decoded) {
    res.status(401).json({
      error: 'Unauthorized',
      message: 'Failed to decode JWT token. Token may be malformed.',
    });
    return;
  }

  // Check if token has expired (basic expiration check without signature verification)
  if (decoded.exp) {
    const currentTime = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
    if (decoded.exp < currentTime) {
      res.status(401).json({
        error: 'Unauthorized',
        message: 'Token has expired',
      });
      return;
    }
  }

  req.decodedToken = decoded;
  req.user = extractUserInfo(decoded);

  console.warn(
    '[DEV ONLY] JWT decoded without verification for user:',
    req.user.id || 'unknown'
  );

  next();
}

export function optionalJwtDecodeMiddleware(
  req: Request,
  res: Response,
  next: NextFunction
): void {
  const token: string | null = extractBearerToken(req.headers.authorization);

  if (!token) {
    next();
    return;
  }

  const decoded = jwt.decode(token, { complete: false }) as DecodedToken | null;

  if (decoded) {
    if (decoded.exp) {
      const currentTime = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
      if (decoded.exp >= currentTime) {
        req.decodedToken = decoded;
        req.user = extractUserInfo(decoded);
      }
    } else {
      req.decodedToken = decoded;
      req.user = extractUserInfo(decoded);
    }
  }

  next();
}

export default jwtDecodeMiddleware;
